overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The character moves from a shaded highway underpass onto a sunlit street with distinctive orange tactile paving, passes various storefronts and pedestrians at an intersection, and enters a covered pedestrian walkway with glass storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: approaching the exit of the overpass, bright sunlight becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the highway overpass following a small group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction toward the overpass exit

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead casting deep shadows on the walkway
smooth gray concrete wall running along the right side of the walkway
tall palm trees visible in the distance through the overpass exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive highway overpass in deep shadow. The camera follows a small group of pedestrians walking toward the bright exit where palm trees and city buildings are visible in the distance. Vehicles pass by on the road to the left while a smooth concrete wall runs along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial boulevard with distinctive orange tactile paving

events.description: exits the shaded overpass into bright sunlight on the open commercial street
brief visual transition effect as the scene loads, then continues walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange-tiled sidewalk past various commercial storefronts and street furniture

entered.detail: distinctive bright orange tactile paving tiles covering the pedestrian walkway
commercial store with illuminated 'softsys' signage and glass entrance
tall modern street lamp with yellow pole and horizontal light fixture
large holographic and digital advertising displays mounted on buildings
green dumpsters and trash bins lined along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass into bright sunlight, the scene reveals a wide commercial boulevard with distinctive orange tactile paving. The camera passes the 'softsys' storefront and various digital billboards while vehicles travel along the multi-lane road to the left. Green dumpsters and construction barriers line the right side of the walkway.

events.description: approaching intersection crosswalk with yellow striped markings
navigating through pedestrians crossing and waiting at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless man in shorts standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross
woman and child walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface
horizontal traffic signal gantries spanning across the intersection
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
large green dumpsters with trash bags piled alongside

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. Various pedestrians are crossing or waiting, including a shirtless man and a woman with a child. The right side features a concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and green dumpsters. Traffic lights and overhead signage dominate the intersection while vehicles pass through.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with glass storefronts

events.description: entering the covered walkway with curved roof structure and glass storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered arcade past glass storefronts and metal support columns

notable_agents.action: woman in purple pants walking toward the camera in the covered walkway

entered.detail: curved metal and glass roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
modern commercial buildings with large glass windows and metal frames
large floating holographic advertisements above the street
yellow structural columns supporting the overhead transit structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a covered pedestrian arcade with a curved roof structure overhead. Glass storefronts line the right side while yellow metal support columns run along the left. Holographic billboards float above the street visible to the left. The lighting becomes mixed as the covered structure provides partial shade while sunlight filters through.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the deep shadows of a highway underpass into a bright, bustling futuristic commercial district. It begins in the dim light beneath a massive overpass, following a group of pedestrians toward a sunlit exit framed by distant palm trees and city buildings. As the camera emerges into the glare of the sun, the environment opens into a wide boulevard characterized by orange tactile paving, digital billboards, and the softsys storefront. The scene then progresses toward a busy intersection filled with pedestrians and graffiti-covered walls before turning into a covered pedestrian arcade. Finally, the lighting shifts to a mix of shade and filtered sunlight as the camera moves beneath a curved roof structure lined with glass storefronts and yellow support columns.
